---
title: "req_kalshi_auth"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `req_kalshi_auth()`

Authenticate a Kalshi API Request

## Usage

```r
req_kalshi_auth(req, kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `req` | An 'httr2' request object. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. The name of the environment variable containing your Kalshi Key ID. Defaults to '"KALSHI_API"'. |

## Value

A modified 'httr2' request object with authentication headers.

## Description

Implements the Kalshi V2 API authentication protocol. Extracts metadata
from an 'httr2' request, generates a SHA-256 RSA-PSS signature, and
attaches the required headers.

## Details

The function signs the base path without query parameters, as required by
Kalshi's authentication scheme.
